name: Conflict Resolution
description: Tests agent's ability to detect and resolve implicit contradictions — tracking which information is current vs outdated.

facts.content: I work as a software engineer at Microsoft

facts.planted_as: Big news — I just accepted a new position at Google! I'm starting next month as a senior engineer.

noise_between_facts: The weather has been really unpredictable this month.

queries.question: Can you tell me about my career history and current role?

facts.content: I switched from an iPhone to a Samsung Galaxy last month
facts.planted_as: I finally switched from my iPhone to a Samsung Galaxy last month. The camera is amazing.

facts.content: I'm learning Spanish in evening classes
facts.planted_as: I signed up for Spanish evening classes at the community center. Always wanted to be fluent.

facts.content: I switched from Spanish to Japanese classes
facts.planted_as: I dropped the Spanish classes — wasn't clicking for me. Switched to Japanese instead, much more motivated now.

facts.content: I actually went back to Spanish classes, dropped Japanese
facts.planted_as: Funny story — I went back to Spanish classes after all. Japanese was way too hard with my schedule. Spanish just makes more sense for me long-term.
My salary just got bumped to 85,000 per year with the new role. Pretty happy about that.

facts.content: My salary increased to 105,000 after the promotion
facts.planted_as: The promotion came with a nice raise — I'm at 105,000 now. Huge jump from the 85k I was making before.
